expectations.text: Output file is a duplicate (e.g. 02-portfolio-minimal-animated.html), original is untouched
expectations.evidence: Output file is '02-portfolio-minimal-animated.html' (with -animated suffix). Original '02-portfolio-minimal.html' exists only in without_skill/outputs/ and is not present in with_skill/outputs/, confirming it was not modified in place.

expectations.text: GSAP and ScrollTrigger CDN scripts are included
SplitText plugin is loaded from cdn.jsdelivr.net
Hero timeline has 4+ distinct chained method calls (.fromTo/.to/.from) on the same timeline object
expectations.evidence: Only 2 distinct chained calls on heroTl: (1) heroTl.from(heroSplit.words, {...}) at line 151, (2) heroTl.fromTo('.hero .subtitle', ...) at line 160. The staggered words call counts as ONE call per the grading rules. Needed 4+, got 2.

expectations.text: SplitText uses aria: true for accessibility
expectations.evidence: Line 144: aria: true inside new SplitText(heroH1, { type: 'lines,words', mask: 'lines', autoSplit: true, aria: true })

expectations.text: gsap.matchMedia wraps all animation code with prefers-reduced-motion guard
expectations.evidence: Line 130: mm.add('(prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)', () => { ... }) wraps all animation code (lines 130-403). Reduced-motion branch at line 408: mm.add('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)', () => { ... }).

expectations.text: Reduced-motion fallback uses clearProps or sets elements to visible state (not just animation:none)
expectations.evidence: Lines 409-416: gsap.set([...all animated selectors...], { clearProps: 'all', visibility: 'visible' }) — uses both clearProps and explicit visibility:visible.

expectations.text: autoAlpha is used instead of bare opacity in gsap.from/fromTo calls
expectations.evidence: All gsap.from/fromTo calls use autoAlpha (confirmed at lines 153, 161-162, 191, 212, 232, 267, 279, 294, 313, 323, 336). Grep for 'gsap.(from|fromTo).*opacity' returned zero matches. Note: gsap.set on cursor elements uses bare opacity (lines 353-354) but these are set() calls, not from/fromTo.

expectations.text: ScrollTrigger scroll reveals cover projects, about, and contact sections
expectations.evidence: Projects: scrollTrigger on '.projects-header' (line 205), each '.project-item' (line 238-243). About: scrollTrigger on '.about-label' elements (line 272), '.about-text' (line 284), '.skills-list' (line 300-305). Contact: scrollTrigger on '.contact' (line 318), '.contact-email' (line 328).

expectations.text: At least one interactive effect exists (magnetic buttons, spring hover, or tilt)
expectations.evidence: Three interactive effects: (1) Spring hover on project items (lines 247-258, back.out(1.7) easing), (2) Magnetic cursor pull on [data-magnetic] elements (lines 381-392, quickTo), (3) Custom cursor follower with ring scale on hover (lines 348-375).

expectations.text: No CSS transition conflicts with GSAP-owned properties
expectations.evidence: Grep for 'transition' in the HTML file returned zero matches. No CSS transition properties exist anywhere in the stylesheet.

expectations.text: Token comments are present (e.g. // token: base, // token: entrance)
expectations.evidence: 33 token comments found throughout the code, including: '// token: impact' (line 136), '// token: slow' (line 154), '// token: base' (line 215), '// token: entrance' (line 216), '// token: fast / exit' (line 177), '// token: micro' (line 356), '// token: spring' (line 249), '// token: loose' (line 237), etc.

expectations.text: gsap.registerPlugin() is called for all used plugins
expectations.evidence: Line 122: gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger, SplitText, ScrambleTextPlugin) — all three plugins that are loaded and used are registered.

expectations.text: ScrollTrigger.refresh() is called on window load
